# CWE-301 — Reflection Attack in an Authentication Protocol (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-301-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: server echoes client challenge as the authentication proof.
func MutualAuth(c *gin.Context) {
	challenge := c.PostForm("challenge")
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"proof": challenge})
}
